items.title: Workqueue: add stale-claim detection
items.description: If an item has claimedBy set but status is still 'pending' and claimedAt is >10 minutes old, any agent should be able to reset the claim and re-attempt. Prevents stuck items if an agent crashes mid-claim. Needs spec agreement from all agents.

items.title: Propose shared file store to replace Google Drive as primary
items.description: Evaluate alternatives to Google Drive for shared agent storage. Current issues: single-writer (only Bullwinkle via gog), slow API, SSH flakiness for SCP. Need all agents read/write, Tailscale-friendly, external publishing option. Full proposal at workqueue/proposals/shared-storage.md. Rocky and Natasha to review and weigh in. jkh to pick and provision.

completed.title: Implement shared work queue system
completed.result: Designed, implemented, reviewed by Rocky, all three agents onboarded. Crons running: Bullwinkle :15/:45, Rocky :00/:30, Natasha :07/:37. First sync confirmed at 7:00 PM PT.

completed.title: Review work queue implementation
completed.result: Approved with additions: claim mechanism, urgent pings, item versioning, staggered cron, itemCount in sync envelope.

completed.title: Adopt work queue system
completed.description: Set up workqueue/ directory with queue.json and WORKQUEUE_AGENT.md (adapted for Natasha). Create cron job at :07 and :37. Review README.md for full spec.
completed.result: Natasha adopted workqueue system. queue.json initialized (agent=natasha), WORKQUEUE_AGENT_NATASHA.md created, cron jobs scheduled at :07 and :37 past the hour. Ready for sync.

syncLog.note: Initial onboarding — received full queue state via Bullwinkle gateway message
